description: You are a DevOps engineer troubleshooting a broken microservices deployment. Two services, 'inventory-service' (Python API) and 'storefront-app' (Node.js Frontend), are running in separate Docker Compose projects in ~/projects/. The storefront fails to load data because it cannot connect to the inventory API. Resolve the connection failure by creating a shared external Docker network and configuring both docker-compose.yml files to attach the services to this network. Update the storefront's configuration to reach the API using its Docker service name instead of 'localhost'. The Compose files must remain separate projects. Verify the fix by ensuring http://localhost:3000 displays the product list. Login: user ga, password password123.
